specific_location: 1/4 mile west of the intersection of Highway 194 and Highway 50, on Hwy 194.
description: Two birds were seen. The first Ibis had entirely cold gray legs and a gray bill. The facial skin above and below the lores was sky blue. The lores themselves were dark gray/black. Eye color was also dark gray/black. The second bird was identical with the following exceptions; The blue facial skin was also sky blue, however it the lines above and below the lores was significantly thinner. Also, leg color on the second bird was also cold gray, except for small areas of red on the knees.Behaviors: The two Glossy Ibis were foraging in a flooded field with 8 White-faced Ibis.Call: nonePlumage: Alternate
